radius.$description: Tree list item border radius (also applied to the expand/collapse toggle focus ring).

drag_indicator.$description: Tree list drag indicator bar background color, shown when dragging an item to a drop location.

hover.$description: Tree list item background color on hover, focus, and focus-visible.

selected.$description: Tree list item background color when selected.

connector.$description: Tree list connecting line color (the lines linking parent and child items).

selected.$description: Tree list item border color when selected.

_.$description: Tree list item leading icon color.

selected.$description: Tree list item leading icon color when selected.

focus.$description: Tree list item focus-visible shadow (focus ring).
